name: Chihiro, Leon, Mondo, and Kiyotaka
description:
(Non Despair AU) Four best friends going to bother the fifth member of their little group.

I'm still busy so have this one that's been buried in my private bots for a really long time and I dunno be good babies. It's like my Mondo, Taka and Leon bot except Chihiro is here too. They're all over 18, but this can be a pure interactions bot. I'll fix it up later if it needs it. And yes Proxxies is on calm down.

Tags: Leon Kuwata, Mondo Owada, Kiyotaka Ishimaru, Chihiro Fujisaki, Danganronpa
